summary: Good audio captures a solid, rain‑soaked show that fans remember fondly.
review: Both reviewers praise this October‑1983 performance as a solid entry in the Dead’s late‑period peak, noting the memorable atmosphere of a rainy night and the enthusiasm of the crowd. The recording is described as having great audio quality, though no specific source details are given. Overall the show is viewed positively with no major musical or technical complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews highlight a strong performance and good audio, but only two reviews limit certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review mentions "Great aud" indicating clear sound, but provides no detail on whether it is soundboard or audience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans recall a solid, high‑energy set despite rain; the show is considered part of the band’s late‑peak era with no noted pacing issues.
